---
title: "Martin N. W. | Statistician & Mathematics Tutor"
subtitle: "Data Analyst • Clinical Trials Researcher • Statistical Consultant"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
---

# Welcome to My Portfolio

Hello and welcome!  

I am **Martin Nyamu Wanjiru**, a passionate **Statistician, Data Analyst, Researcher, and Mathematics Tutor** with over **five years of experience** in statistical analysis, clinical trials research, data management, and quantitative research.

I specialize in transforming complex data into meaningful insights that support evidence-based decision-making in research, healthcare, education, and business.

---

# About Me

I hold a strong background in **Medical Statistics** with extensive experience in:

- Clinical trials and health research
- Statistical modeling and data analysis
- Research methodology and biostatistics
- Data management and quality assurance
- Academic writing and technical reporting
- Mathematics and statistics tutoring

I am passionate about helping researchers, students, and organizations solve real-world problems using data-driven approaches.

---

# What I Do

## 📊 Statistical Analysis & Research

I provide professional support in:

- Data cleaning and management
- Descriptive and inferential statistics
- Regression modeling
- Epidemiological analysis
- Clinical trial data analysis
- Survey and questionnaire analysis
- Research proposal development
- Thesis and dissertation support

---

## 📚 Mathematics & Statistics Tutoring

I am also an experienced **Mathematics and Statistics Tutor**, helping students understand concepts clearly and improve their academic performance.

### Areas I Teach
- Basic Mathematics
- Algebra & Calculus
- Probability & Statistics
- Biostatistics
- Research Methods
- Data Analysis using R & Python

---

# Technical Skills

## Programming & Data Tools

- **R Programming**
  - Statistical modeling
  - Data visualization
  - Reproducible research

- **Python**
  - Data analysis
  - Machine learning
  - Automation

- **Excel**
  - Advanced formulas
  - Dashboards
  - Data management

---

## Documentation & Publishing

- **Quarto**
  - Dynamic reports
  - Books and websites
  - Interactive dashboards

- **LaTeX**
  - Academic publishing
  - Professional reports
  - Scientific documentation

- **Git & GitHub**
  - Version control
  - Collaborative research
  - Project management

---

# Professional Interests

My professional interests include:

- Clinical trials research
- Mathematical epidemiology
- Public health analytics
- Statistical consulting
- Educational technology
- Reproducible research

---

# Teaching Profiles

## TeacherOn

<a href="https://www.teacheron.com/tutor/dDNR?r=dDNR" target="_blank" style="display: inline-block;">
  <img src="https://www.teacheron.com/resources/assets/img/badges/proudToBeTeacher.png" 
       alt="TeacherOn Badge"
       style="width: 160px !important; height: 68px !important;">
</a>

---

## Preply Tutor Profile

<a href="https://preply.com/en/tutor/102126" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success btn-lg">
  📘 View My Preply Tutor Profile
</a>

---

# Contact Me

I am open to:

- Research collaborations
- Statistical consulting
- Data analysis projects
- Mathematics and statistics tutoring
- Academic writing support

📧 **Email:** <analystnyamu79@gmail.com>

---

# Let’s Work Together

Whether you need support in research, data analysis, statistical modeling, or tutoring, I would be happy to collaborate with you.

Thank you for visiting my portfolio.
